channel.title: DP on Biblioteca Maratona UFMG
channel.description: Recent content in DP on Biblioteca Maratona UFMG

item.title: Divide and Conquer DP
item.description: Sobre linkParticiona o array em k subarrays minimizando o somatorio das queries O(k n log n), assumindo quer query(l, r) eh O(1) Link original: dcDp.cpp Código link ll dp[MAX][2]; void solve(int k, int l, int r, int lk, int rk) { if (l > r) return; int m = (l+r)/2, p = -1; auto& ans = dp[m][k&1] = LINF; for (int i = max(m, lk); i <= rk; i++) { ll at = dp[i+1][~k&1] + query(m, i); if (at < ans) ans = at, p = i; } solve(k, l, m-1, lk, p), solve(k, m+1, r, p, rk); } ll DC(int n, int k) { dp[n][0] = dp[n][1] = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) dp[i][0] = LINF; for (int i = 1; i <= k; i++) solve(i, 0, n-i, 0, n-i); return dp[0][k&1]; }

item.title: Longest Common Subsequence
item.description: Sobre linkComputa a LCS entre dois arrays usando o algoritmo de Hirschberg para recuperar O(n*m), O(n+m) de memoria Link original: lcs.cpp Código link int lcs_s[MAX], lcs_t[MAX]; int dp[2][MAX]; // dp[0][j] = max lcs(s[li...ri], t[lj, lj+j]) void dp_top(int li, int ri, int lj, int rj) { memset(dp[0], 0, (rj-lj+1)*sizeof(dp[0][0])); for (int i = li; i <= ri; i++) { for (int j = rj; j >= lj; j--) dp[0][j - lj] = max(dp[0][j - lj], (lcs_s[i] == lcs_t[j]) + (j > lj ?

item.title: Mochila
item.description: Sobre linkResolve mochila, recuperando a resposta O(n * cap), O(n + cap) de memoria Link original: mochila.cpp Código link int v[MAX], w[MAX]; // valor e peso int dp[2][MAX_CAP]; // DP usando os itens [l, r], com capacidade = cap void get_dp(int x, int l, int r, int cap) { memset(dp[x], 0, (cap+1)*sizeof(dp[x][0])); for (int i = l; i <= r; i++) for (int j = cap; j >= 0; j--) if (j - w[i] >= 0) dp[x][j] = max(dp[x][j], v[i] + dp[x][j - w[i]]); } void solve(vector<int>& ans, int l, int r, int cap) { if (l == r) { if (w[l] <= cap) ans.

item.title: SOS DP
item.description: Sobre linkO(n 2^n) soma de sub-conjunto Link original: sosDP.cpp Código link vector<ll> sos_dp(vector<ll> f) { int N = __builtin_ctz(f.size()); assert((1<<N) == f.size()); for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) for (int mask = 0; mask < (1<<N); mask++) if (mask>>i&1) f[mask] += f[mask^(1<<i)]; return f; } // soma de super-conjunto vector<ll> sos_dp(vector<ll> f) { int N = __builtin_ctz(f.size()); assert((1<<N) == f.size()); for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) for (int mask = 0; mask < (1<<N); mask++) if (~mask>>i&1) f[mask] += f[mask^(1<<i)]; return f; }

item.title: Subset sum
item.description: Sobre linkRetorna max(x <= t tal que existe subset de w que soma x) O(n * max(w)) O(max(w)) de memoria Link original: subsetSum.cpp Código link int subset_sum(vector<int> w, int t) { int pref = 0, k = 0; while (k < w.size() and pref + w[k] <= t) pref += w[k++]; if (k == w.size()) return pref; int W = *max_element(w.begin(), w.end()); vector<int> last, dp(2*W, -1); dp[W - (t-pref)] = k; for (int i = k; i < w.
